MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Derek Longstaff, Esq. of Howard Rome Martin & Ridley, 650-365-7715 for defendant and moving party City of Daly City.
Teresa Tan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4272 for defendant and moving party City and County of San Francisco.
Denise Ruelas, Esq. of Berger Kahn, 415-899-1770 for defendant Hartford Underwriters.
Clifford Baker, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, 415-986-5900 for defendant The Olympic Club.
Wesley Lowe, Esq. of Mannion & Lowe, 415-733-1050 for plaintiffs Anthony and Teresa Devincenzi, Edward and Katherine King, Roy and Barbara Pasini and Rosa Rodriguiz

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D and the Court modified its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT CITY OF DALY CITY'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY IS GRANTED FOR CASE 437-209 AND COMPANION CASE 436-545. Counsel to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558(301/JLW/DS)

Joinder Motion To Consolidate Adn Transfer Venue To Santa Clara County
Off Calendar Jul-01-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Derek Longstaff, Esq. of Howard Rome Martin & Ridley, 650-365-7715 for defendant and moving party City of Daly City.
Teresa Tan, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-4272 for defendant and moving party City and County of San Francisco.
Denise Ruelas, Esq. of Berger Kahn, 415-899-1770 for defendant Hartford Underwriters.
Clifford Baker, Esq. of Gordon & Rees, 415-986-5900 for defendant The Olympic Club.
Wesley Lowe, Esq. of Mannion & Lowe, 415-733-1050 for plaintiffs Anthony and Teresa Devincenzi, Edward and Katherine King, Roy and Barbara Pasini and Rosa Rodriguiz

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court modified its Tentative Ruling:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO Joinder Motion To Consolidate Adn Transfer Venue To Santa Clara County is GRANTED AS TO THE VENUE CHANGE FOR CASE 437-209 AND COMPANION CASE 436-545. Counsel to submit form of order. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558. (301/JLW/DS)
